channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.description:
There is a pile of dog waste next to one of the trees on the side of the road with houses on

I reported this a week ago ( reference 9232939 ) and some of the grass was cut but not the area adjacent to my property ( 10 Polperro Close )
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowden Road, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Rubbish being dumped, 15th April
item.description:
This is a reoccurring issue. Rubbish is being dumped in this area every week. It is causing a mess and attracting pests

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Monro Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and cracked road in the middle of the road., 15th April
item.description:
A significant pothole and several cracks have developed in the middle of the road, posing a hazard to cars. The surrounding cracks are spreading, further compromising the road surface and this has been like this for more than 2 months. Vehicles passing over the pothole risk tire blowouts and damage, leading to costly repairs. Sudden jolts from hitting the pothole has already caused misalignment and damage to the right side suspension spring which broke after driving a few meters after driving through the pothole on this road. My vehicle was undriveable due to the damage and had to be towed away by the RAC straight to a the garage. This unfortunately left me with a hefty bill to pay for the repairs which were unexpected. The presence of this hazard increases the likelihood of accidents, as drivers are now swerving to avoid the pothole, potentially colliding with other vehicles. Due to high traffic volume, capturing close-up pictures of the damage has proven challenging. The busy nature of the road hinders the ability to safely document the extent of the damage without risking my personal safety and obstructing traffic flow. Would you kindly attend to this as a matter of urgency.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eastern Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th April
item.description:
Fly tipping that includes food waste and nappies. The bags have been pulled all down the alley way by the foxes and rats.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, Plumstead

item.title: Weeds growing in rain garden - never maintained., 15th April
item.description:
This planter / rain garden seems like it is forgotten for maintenance. It’s just full of weeds and pulled up plants. Is there a schedule to maintain these that this is missing from?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement sinking next to / under railway bridge, 15th April
item.description:
The pavement by the railway bridge is sinking. Has got worse since this morning! Tried to report to out of hours given it is the base of bridge but couldn't help

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley High Street, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
